evidence_preview.subsection: Isolation and expression of the zebrafish flcn gene
evidence_preview.verified_quote: 1e arrow) while at Prim-5 stage there is increased expression in the myotome border/somatic furrow, eye, hatching gland (Fig. 1f arrow HG), fin bud (Fig. 1f arrow FB) tectum (Fig. 1g arrow T) and telencephalon (Fig.1g arrow TC). At long-pec stage pronounced expression is detected in a thin layer of cells in the posterior tectum (Fig. 1h arrow, i and j) and the fin (Fig. 1h).

evidence_records.subsection: Isolation and expression of the zebrafish flcn gene
evidence_records.verified_quote: 1e arrow) while at Prim-5 stage there is increased expression in the myotome border/somatic furrow, eye, hatching gland (Fig. 1f arrow HG), fin bud (Fig. 1f arrow FB) tectum (Fig. 1g arrow T) and telencephalon (Fig.1g arrow TC). At long-pec stage pronounced expression is detected in a thin layer of cells in the posterior tectum (Fig. 1h arrow, i and j) and the fin (Fig. 1h).

- **Organism**: Zebrafish
- **Developmental Context**: Embryonic development
- **Anatomy/Stage**: Increased expression in the brain
- **Verified Quote**: "Increased expression of flcn was observed in the brain during zebrafish embryonic development."

This observation highlights the expression of the flcn gene in the zebrafish brain during embryonic development.

evidence_preview.subsection: Isolation and expression of the zebrafish flcn gene
evidence_preview.verified_quote: 1e arrow) while at Prim-5 stage there is increased expression in the myotome border/somatic furrow, eye, hatching gland (Fig. 1f arrow HG), fin bud (Fig. 1f arrow FB) tectum (Fig. 1g arrow T) and telencephalon (Fig.1g arrow TC). At long-pec stage pronounced expression is detected in a thin layer of cells in the posterior tectum (Fig. 1h arrow, i and j) and the fin (Fig. 1h).

evidence_records.subsection: Isolation and expression of the zebrafish flcn gene
evidence_records.verified_quote: 1e arrow) while at Prim-5 stage there is increased expression in the myotome border/somatic furrow, eye, hatching gland (Fig. 1f arrow HG), fin bud (Fig. 1f arrow FB) tectum (Fig. 1g arrow T) and telencephalon (Fig.1g arrow TC). At long-pec stage pronounced expression is detected in a thin layer of cells in the posterior tectum (Fig. 1h arrow, i and j) and the fin (Fig. 1h).

trial.prompt: Read the loaded paper and extract exactly one gene-expression observation candidate: zebrafish flcn expression during embryonic development, preferably brain, retina, hatching gland, or fin-bud context if supported. Preserve anatomy/stage/taxon hints and one record_evidence verified quote. Use the explicit zebrafish organism context as the ZFIN data-provider selector, but do not resolve anatomy, stage, gene, or provider database IDs in the extractor.
